breakingChanges.description: Migrated from governance/ to assets/initializer-question-pack.v1.json
Added lifecycle hook system and version stamp in generated projects
Promoted cross-agent task-sync contracts, skill eval assets, and milestone-only progress tracking
Upgraded generated repos to a shared long-running harness with spec, sprint review, handoff, structured checks, and read-only Claude auto memory intake signals
Added run_id-linked verification, 5-dimensional harness profiles, and structured failure_class logging with summary tooling
Introduced a versioned workflow contract manifest, inspection-first routing, and first-class legacy workflow-doc migration
Added progressive context and harness policy surfaces, plus fixed nested AGENTS placement and custom-plan monorepo drift
Removed legacy Skill Factory and auto-memory surfaces, and added guidance-only external tooling detection plus migration defaults
Added Codex-first Waza harness detection, update drift reporting, and verified Codex runtime sync guidance
Added agentic development routing, selector-hooked functional-block CLAUDE/AGENTS context generation, removed repo-local Claude hook shims, and hardened workflow migration checks
Added minimal-agentic documentation generation, functional-block LSP profile metadata, conflict-triggered Codex worktree validation policy, and explicit notes/evidence/asset lifecycle artifacts
Removed docs/PROGRESS.md and root specs from default generated surfaces, moved durable progress to tasks/workstreams, and added _ref/_ops path governance with hook guards
Added a contract-driven upgrade strategy for legacy workflow reconfiguration and cleanup, plus a global Claude/Codex working-rules reference
Installs all router entrypoints into generated repos and hardens capability discovery against ignored worktree caches

Renamed the public skill surface to repo-harness, added action-style command facades, externalized optional long docs to the default brain, and kept reusable-workflow packaging behind advisory hooks plus user-approved autoplan
Adds the plugin architecture context map, ignores repo-local runtime trace state, and fixes installed-copy sync through symlinked legacy fallback paths
Excludes ignored repo-local runtime state from installed-copy sync outputs
Adds filesystem-owned Evidence Contract gates for approved plans and hardens Waza tooling integrity checks across managed skill directories and shared rules
Refreshes stale reference and architecture docs for the current repo-harness command, hook, migration, eval, plugin, and minimal-documentation contracts
Adds generated Codex hook adapter support through .codex/hooks.json while keeping .ai/hooks as the shared implementation layer
Adds passive plan capture, opt-in repo-to-brain document sync, and required CodeGraph readiness for Codex code navigation
Fixes terse GO approval prompts so post-plan execution cannot bypass the plans workflow gate
Starts a Draft plan workflow when explicit Waza think or Codex Plan prompts begin, while preserving approval-time execution gates
Expands anchored approval intent variants so natural post-plan approval wording reaches capture and projection gates without broadening bug-fix implementation wording
Retires the separate 5.x generated workflow compatibility line; package, skill, and template stamps now share the repo-harness npm release version
Adds runtime safety fixes for session-scoped CodeGraph routing, central-first hook execution, and the tasks/todos workflow-document migration
Adds the PRD-to-Sprint planning hierarchy, isolates generated-project helper runtime under .ai/harness/scripts, and installs the subagent return-channel guard
Adds bundled runtime docs lookup, init-hook bootstrap audit guidance, first-principles edit guard coverage, and slimmer generated reference-doc assets
Splits user-level runtime refresh from repo adoption, adds package-dispatched helper commands, documents the eight managed hook routes, and prepares the release README surface
Fixes CodeGraph readiness detection by preferring the local platform bundle before the npm shim and syncs the downstream helper template
Adds weekly tooling-update advisory caching, reviewed security exceptions, gbrain fast-doctor warning handling, and Claude review transcript recovery
Fixes repo-harness update --version so the update command can install a pinned package version without being intercepted by the top-level CLI version flag
Adds the transactional adoption planner foundation with protocol v1 dry-run plans, manifest-owned bootstrap templates, experimental TypeScript apply, atomic writes, and rollback metadata
Adds the ChatGPT browser engine with repo-local sessions, opt-in MCP browser tools, an Oracle wrapper, a native Chrome CDP provider spike, and hosted CI gate hardening
Adds GPT Pro setup and consult command skills over the ChatGPT Web browser bridge and keeps PostBash advisory traces out of the authoritative latest checks trace
Hardens GPT Pro setup bootstrap gates, preserves ChatGPT MCP connector settings, adds Oracle heartbeat support, and makes Oracle repair guidance source-aware
Adds the Controller V2 tool surface, explicit long-running Agent timeout propagation, heartbeat and retry evidence, stale Connector diagnostics, and a visual Issue/Task/Run control plane.
